nodes.label: Evidence Control Room
nodes.rationale: The interface should feel precise before decorative because evaluators scan proof with limited attention late in the hiring loop.

nodes.label: Run Signal Cyan
nodes.rationale: Cyan is intentionally scarce so it reads as state, proof, focus, or action instead of decoration.

nodes.label: Cabinet Grotesk and Figtree Typography System
nodes.norm_label: cabinet grotesk and figtree typography system

nodes.label: Motion Discipline
nodes.rationale: Motion should clarify state through transform and opacity while honoring reduced motion and avoiding layout animation.

nodes.label: Proof Modules
nodes.rationale: Proof modules must appear early because the portfolio promise is evidence before decoration.

nodes.label: Interactive Resume Purpose
nodes.rationale: The site should showcase Senior QA experience while demonstrating both technical capability and aesthetic sensibility.

nodes.label: Accessibility and Inclusion Requirements
nodes.rationale: Accessibility is non-negotiable, with WCAG AA contrast, clear focus states, and reduced-motion considerations.
